content.full_text:
May 31, 1990

Mr. John Rothman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, Ca 95814

Re: Oral opinion concerning conflict of interest

Dear Mr. Rothman:

This is to confirm our conversation yesterday in which you informed me that no conflict of interest exists when a county Assistant Planner is in the process of purchasing real property in a county redevelopment area and the property is still in escrow. You also informed me that no conflict would arise even after the close of escrow, provided that the Assistant Planner's duties are only ministerial in nature. I recognize that you will need a more detailed job description to make a determination in this particular case.

Thank you very much for your help in this matter.

Very Truly Yours,

HYDE, MILLER & SAVAGE  
A Professional Corporation

By: [signature]  
Paul J. Chrisman
